title: Screenplay Step 3 Output Schema (HOOK-09 emotion_curve marker contract)
description:
JSON Schema for the output of run_screenplay_step3_roundtable.py.
Mirrors HOOK-09 emotion_curve marker contract per 05-POC-PLAN.md §3.2:
the screenplay Step 3 JSON must declare logline + scene_breakdown (each
with its own per-scene emotion_curve) + hooks + payoffs + cliffhangers
+ a top-level emotion_curve array. Downstream hook_retention +
script_auditor + storyboard Step 6.5 + visual_executor Step 7 all
consume these arrays — losing them in transform breaks the pipeline
(Phase 49 §2.4 HOOK-09 invariant).

logline.description: One-line story premise. minLength 10 filters placeholder/empty loglines.

scene_breakdown.description: Per-scene structural breakdown. Each scene carries its own emotion_curve array so downstream hook_retention can verify per-scene marker coverage (HOOK-09 contract per 05-POC-PLAN.md §3.2).

scene_id.description: Stable scene identifier (e.g. 'S1', 'S2-1'). Used by payoffs.setup_scene_id + cliffhangers.scene_id cross-references.

emotion_curve.description: Per-scene emotion curve markers (HOOK-09). Each entry pins arousal + valence at a timestamp within this scene.

hooks.description: HOOK-09 hook markers. Each hook pins a retention event at a timestamp; type enumerates the 5 hook categories per hook_retention §2.2.

payload.description: Free-text description of the hook event (model-generated).

payoffs.description: HOOK-09 payoff markers. Each payoff links a setup scene to its resolution scene — preserves narrative promise-fulfillment chain.

cliffhangers.description: HOOK-09 cliffhanger markers. Each cliffhanger pins a scene-ending tension event + cut_point_seconds for editorial timing.

emotion_curve.description: Top-level emotion curve markers (HOOK-09). Distinct from per-scene emotion_curve inside scene_breakdown — this array is what hook_retention + script_auditor cross-reference against hooks/payoffs/cliffhangers for marker-coverage checks. MUST be non-empty per HOOK-09 contract.
